instruction: 1) The cafeteria workers keep small milk cartons in the refrigerator in stacks of 7. If each worker carries no more than one stack then at least [ANS] cafeteria workers needed to carry small milk cartons for a class of 60. 2) In the teacher's lunchroom, teachers sit at tables for 6. There are 49 teachers eating lunch, so [ANS] tables must be set up. 3) A truck is loaded with 9801 kilograms of food. Each box of food weighs 27 kilograms. That means that there are [ANS] boxes on the truck. 4) There are 5249 auto parts to be packed for a shipment with as many boxes full as possible. The parts are to be packed 24 to a box. There will be [ANS] full boxes and [ANS] parts left over.
